hero.title:
Quality residential fencing
from $80 per metre
hero.intro: Family-owned and operated. Free quotes, reliable service, and expert installation for Colorbond, timber, paling, pool fencing, and gates across Melbourne's Eastern Suburbs.

gallery.title: Colorbond Steel Fencing
gallery.description: Modern Colorbond fencing in a range of colours — clean lines, low maintenance, built to last.

gallery.title: Timber Paling Fencing
gallery.description: Classic timber paling — natural appearance, full privacy, and that warm backyard feel.

gallery.title: Pool Safety Fencing
gallery.description: Compliant pool fencing that keeps your family safe without compromising on style.

gallery.title: Rural & Agricultural
gallery.description: Post-and-wire, hingejoint, and rural fencing for properties of any size across the Yarra Valley.
